response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack experience with strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Node.js, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background includes scalable systems, database management (MongoDB, SQL), and modern architectures (Kubernetes, AWS), though some niche skills like LLM/API integration are unmentioned. His leadership in open-source projects and pragmatic problem-solving suggest a good cultural fit for a junior/mid-level role.
strengths: Proven fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple commercial projects
Experience with scalable architectures, including Kubernetes, AWS, and high-performance databases
Strong collaboration and mentorship record, evidenced by workshops, open-source contributions, and team leadership
concerns: Current role as Senior/Staff Engineer may lead to overqualification for an entry-level position, risking role misalignment
Lack of explicit experience with PostgreSQL (preferred for the role) in recent roles; mostly MongoDB/SQL
Minimal mention of clean software architecture focus in recent work; more emphasis on practical solutions

key_factors.factor: Scalability and modern architecture knowledge (Kubernetes, AWS)
